title: Saudi Arabian Chicken Wrap
description: A flavorful wrap filled with tender chicken, inspired by Saudi Arabian and German cuisines.
instructions: Season the chicken with cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to the oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in the skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the shredded lettuce and cook until wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
Warm the flatbread wraps according to package instructions.
Assemble the wraps by placing a portion of the chicken, onion mixture, lettuce, and tomato on each wrap.
Cut the wraps in half and serve with your favorite sides.
